Class APIManager

java.lang.Object
io.github.sentinel.apis.APIManager
public class APIManager extends Object
Tracks which API is currently being used and requests the APIFactory create it if it does not exist.
Author:
Sentinel Framework

    • api

  • Constructor Details

    • APIManager

      private APIManager()

  • Method Details

    • setAPI

      public static void setAPI(String apiName)
      Stores an API using the passed API name to instantiate it.
      Parameters:
      apiName - String the name of the sentinel API object to create and store

    • getAPI

      public static API getAPI()
      Returns the currently active API
      Returns:
      API Currently selected API by the tester.

    • setBody

      public static void setBody(String body)
      Sets the body of a new request for the current API
      Parameters:
      body - String the body in the form of json

    • setMultipartFormDataBody

      public static void setMultipartFormDataBody(String nameOfInput, String boundary, InputStream inputStream, String filename)
      Sets the body to a multipart/form-data body, using the given name, boundary, input stream, and filename. Also sets a header with the Content-Type set to 'multipart/form-data' and specifies the boundary string passed to this method.
      Parameters:
      nameOfInput - String name of the multipart segment. Sometimes applications require this parameter to be a specific value in order to accept file uploads.
      boundary - String the multipart boundary. This method also adds a header specifying this value.
      inputStream - InputStream input stream of the file to upload.
      filename - String name of the file being uploaded.

    • addParameter

      public static void addParameter(String parameter, String value)
      Set a parameter and its value for a request. They will show up as part of the query string in the API request.
      Parameters:
      parameter - String the parameter being passed
      value - String the value to be passed

    • addHeader

      public static void addHeader(String name, String value)
      Set a header and its value for a request.
      Parameters:
      name - String the name being passed
      value - String the value to be passed

    • sendRequest

      public static void sendRequest(RequestType type, String endpoint)
      Send a request of the given type. The response will be stored in a Response object that the APIManager can retrieve.
      Parameters:
      type - io.github.sentinel.enums.RequestType the type of request to send
      endpoint - the endpoint to send the request

    • getResponse

      public static Response getResponse()
      Returns the most recent response.
      Returns:
      Response the response

    • setResponse

      public static void setResponse(Response response)
      Sets the most recent response.
      Parameters:
      response - Response the response
